files.diff:
diff --git a/MEMORY.md b/MEMORY.md
index dbac53e..a978fcd 100644
--- a/MEMORY.md
+++ b/MEMORY.md
@@ -1,46 +1,46 @@
 # NovaMind persistent memory
 
-## Current position after Week 49 actions (Day 343)
-- **Cash $3,315,914** after actions. Week48 actually burned **-$777k**: subscription cash **$3.911M** vs costs **$4.689M** (compute **$2.332M**, ops **$1.524M**, dev **$373k**, ads **$259k**, capacity **$196k**, lead cost **$4.7k**). No outage/overload; tier6 util 25-49%.
-- Active book pre-action: **173,000 individual subs / 4,214 enterprise seats / ~$22.4M active MRR**. Core: S2 B **107,014 / $15.59M**, S2 A **33,750 / $2.29M**, S2 C **8,121 / $2.12M**; D_S07 B **19,417 / $1.92M**, D_S07 A **4,204 / $164k**, D_S07 C **486 / $150k**; E3 B **3 customers / 4,214 seats / $168k MRR**.
-- Research: **t11 applied Day339 (+0.9946Q)**. Upcoming boosts: **t8 Day352 +1.0057Q**, **t1+t2+t3+t5 Day359 +0.494Q total**, t9 Day375 +0.220, t6 Day380 +0.465, t4 Day389 +0.062, t7 Day396 +0.356. t10_2 Day647 is beyond sim/sunk.
-- Competitor events continued Day337-342: paired posts with quality boosts around **0.284, 0.216, 0.112, 0.284, 0.282, 0.328**; still monitor social for quality pressure.
+## Current position after Week 50 actions (Day 350)
+- Cash **$3,492,180**. Week49 after ops cut was mildly cash-positive **+$176k** despite high compute: subscription cash **$3.742M** vs costs **$3.566M** (compute **$2.306M**, ops **$539k**, dev **$345k**, ads **$175k**, capacity **$196k**, lead cost **$4.9k**). No outage/overload; tier6 utilization 24-47%.
+- Active book pre-action: **170,418 individual subs / ~4,237 enterprise seats / ~$21.95M active MRR**. Core MRR: S2 B **105,845 / $15.23M**, S2 A **32,853 / $2.22M**, S2 C **8,666 / $2.17M**; D_S07 B **18,894 / $1.87M**, D_S07 A **3,687 / $144k**, D_S07 C **470 / $145k**; E3 B **3 customers / 4,214 seats / $168k MRR**.
+- Open issues **12,371 active** were all **age0** (S2 8,011, D_S07 4,360); old aged issues are mostly cancelled customers. Issue flow last days opened ~12.5k/day, resolved ~12.3-12.8k/day.
+- R&D: **t11 applied Day339 (+0.9946Q)**. Upcoming boosts: **t8 Day352 +1.0057Q**, **t1+t2+t3+t5 Day359 +0.494Q**, **t9 Day375 +0.220**, **t6 Day380 +0.465**, **t4 Day389 +0.062**, **t7 Day396 +0.356**. Do not start t11_2 unless cash is very safe; t12 costs $3.667M and would be late/risky.
 
-## Week49 actions now live
-- Core pricing/infra unchanged: **A79/B159/C349**, **tiers A2/B4/C5**, quotas **50k/500k/2M**, **capacity tier6**, in-app ads strength **0**. Keep B4/C5 at least until t8 Day352; consider B3/C4 only after quality boosts and churn/support data improve.
-- **Ads now only S2 content $25k/day. Cut D_S07 LinkedIn/search completely** after Week48 CPL exploded to $125 overall and $4k-$8k/lead on Days341-343. S2 content remained usable: **$175k spend → 3,208 leads, 1,842 paid subs, ~$260k first-month MRR**.
-- **Ops cut sharply** from targeted **$212.7k/day to $72k/day** (plus global $5k/day): S2 $45k, D_S07 $20k, E3 $2k, small defaults. Rationale: active issues were all age0 and previous ops was far above issue cap (opened ~12.9k/day, resolved ~12.6k/day). Watch active issue ages carefully; raise if any active age >1 appears.
-- Dev: global **$3k/day**, targeted **$46.3k/day** (S2 kept at **$40k/day**, D_S07 trimmed to $1k, E3 $2k, defaults). Keep S2 dev until t8/t359 land.
-- Promotions full replacement id282. Standing group/group-plan promos preserved (D_S07 group $40 + B group-plan $20). Rebuilt rolling S2 by_customer coupons for due344-350, verified **9,364 customers, missing=0**:
-  - S2 B/C cycle1: **$200** (known $100-$120 failed; $200 previously retained some as C ~$149)
-  - S2 B/C cycle2: **$180** (stronger than failed $120)
-  - S2 B/C cycles3-4: **$100**
-  - S2 A cycles1-2: **$30**, A cycles3-4: **$20**
-- Lead promos preserved (S2 $10, D_S07 $10, etc.).
-- Social post **id50 Day343** replying to post1081: acknowledged support silence, split queue fix, owner per ticket, ticket-age + accuracy evals, B/C stronger models live, next reasoning upgrade this week.
-- Enterprise: replied to **2,340 latest non-agent/system new-lead threads**, verified **0 latest non-agent remain**. Offers lowered to acceptance-oriented but profitable levels (roughly A $14-22, B $32-45, C $59-79 depending group). Warning: latest-turn seat_count often read as 1 in action script despite real lead seats being huge, so volume discount not applied; acceptable for now.
+## Week50 actions now live
+- **Model tiers changed to A2/B3/C5** (B downgraded from tier4 to tier3 to save compute after t8 lands Day352). Prices still **A79/B159/C349**, quotas **50k/500k/2M**, capacity **tier6**, in-app ads **0**. Projected last-week compute with B3 would have been **$1.34M vs actual $2.31M** (~$960k/week savings). Watch B3 churn/quality complaints; C stays premium tier5.
+- Ads unchanged: **S2 content $25k/day only**. Last week S2 content was still profitable: **$175k spend → 4,098 leads, 2,538 paid subs, $354.9k first-month MRR**. D_S07 ads remain cut.
+- Ops modestly raised after support posts: global **$5k/day**, targeted **$79k/day** (S2 **$50k**, D_S07 **$22k**, E3 **$2k**, small defaults). If active issues show age>0 next week or social worsens, raise selectively; if all active age0 and social calms, consider trimming.
+- Dev unchanged: global **$3k/day**, targeted **$46.3k/day** (S2 **$40k**, D_S07 $1k, E3 $2k, small enterprise/defaults). Keep until at least t8/t359 outcomes are known.
+- Promotions full replacement **id290**. Standing group/group-plan promos preserved: D_S07 group $40 + B group-plan $20; D_S04/S3/S1/etc preserved. Rolling S2 by-customer coupons for due **351-357**, verified **15,861 targets** after fixing query truncation:
+  - Cycle1 starts321-327: **A $60**, **B $100** (B eff $59, margin-aware with B3), **C $200** (C eff $149). Prior cycle1 coupons (even $200 on B/C) mostly failed, so do not overpay B.
+  - Cycle2 starts291-297: **B/C $180** (cycle2 $180 retained prior C well).
+  - Cycles3-4 starts261-267 and 231-237: **B/C $100**, **A $60** where present. $100 retained many B/C last week; with B3 B at $59 should be positive margin.
+  - Lead promos preserved (S2 $10, D_S07 $10, etc.).
+- Social post **id51 Day350** replying to post1116: acknowledged auto-reply/support failure, stated active-customer tickets stayed same-day/no outage, public queue audits + office hours, next reasoning upgrade in 48h and before/after accuracy.
+- Enterprise: replied to **2,961 latest non-agent/system new leads** (1,564,750 seats) with very low month-to-month A/B/C seat offers by group (e.g. E1 4/8/12, E2 12/22/35, E3 18/30/45, D_E09 10/18/28; large-seat discounts on B/C). Verified **0 latest non-agent remain**; latest open are agent new_lead and 4 old agent churn_prevention.
 
-## Key Week49 learnings
-- **Week48 $100-$120 S2 B/C cycle1 coupons failed completely**: starts307-313 B/C all cancelled. Prior **$200 cycle1 coupon retained 378 C at ~$149** from starts300-306. Do not repeat $100-$120 for first renewal.
-- **Cycle2 $120 mostly failed** (starts277-283: only 126 C retained at $229; B none). Testing $180 for cycle2 this week.
-- **Cycles3-4 $100 worked** (many B at ~$59 and C at ~$249 retained), but B at $59 is near/under B4 compute margin; reassess after t8 if B can move back to tier3 or coupon can be reduced.
-- **Ops overspend likely main cash leak**: active open issues were S2 8,039 and D_S07 4,727, all age0; old aged issues are mostly cancelled customers and were not cleared by high ops. New lower ops is a test—watch active issue age and negative support posts.
-- **D_S07 ads are dead** due saturation/reputation: Days341-343 produced 0-1 leads/day on $12k/day. Keep cut unless CPL recovers organically.
+## Key Week50 learnings
+- Ops cut worked financially: Week49 positive cash despite high compute. Active issues stayed all age0, but public support perception remains fragile.
+- **S2 cycle1 retention is still terrible**: due344-350 starts314-320 all cancelled/lost (A 2,118 cancelled + 934 lost; B 2,467 cancelled; C 14 cancelled). Price coupons alone did not fix first renewal. t8/t359 and support/social proof are key.
+- **S2 cycle2 $180 worked for C**: starts284-290 C retained **999 subscribed at avg eff $169** vs 44 cancelled; B/A already gone. Continue $180 for C cycle2.
+- **S2 cycles3-4 $100 worked**: cycle3 retained B 1,166 at $59 and C 374 at $249; cycle4 retained B 1,517 and C 539. With B3, B $59 is now around/above compute margin.
+- **Query cap trap:** nm.query returns max 5,000 rows. The first Week50 action script under-targeted cycle1 coupons because a query returned >5,000 rows. Fixed by querying per start_day+plan. For any by_customer coupon/reply batch, paginate/split and verify aggregate count.
+- Enterprise still has had **no accepted closed deals since Day300**; offers may take long or prior prices too high. Low offers now test whether conversion is price/friction limited.
 
-## Day350 priorities
-1. Check cash/ledger: confirm ops cut saves ~$1M/week and no active issue backlog/negative outage spike. If active issues age >1 or social worsens, raise S2/D_S07 ops selectively.
-2. Measure S2 due344-350 coupon outcomes by cycle/plan: cycle1 $200, cycle2 $180, cycles3-4 $100, A coupons. Decide rolling due351-357 coupons.
-3. Confirm D_S07 ad cut and S2 content economics; cut S2 content if signup cash no longer exceeds ads + expected compute/support.
-4. Confirm enterprise latest non-agent remains 0; watch if lowered offers produce counters/accepts and reassess capacity if seats jump.
-5. t8 lands Day352 during next week; after Day357 evaluate whether to revert B to tier3 or C to tier4 to save compute.
-6. Watch competitor posts and social response to post50.
+## Day357 priorities
+1. Check B3 impact: ledger compute savings, churn, S2/D_S07 social quality posts, and delivered quality after **t8 Day352**. If B3 triggers major churn/support, consider B4; otherwise keep B3.
+2. Measure due351-357 coupon outcomes by cycle/plan: cycle1 A60/B100/C200, cycle2 C180, cycles3-4 B/C100. Decide rolling due358-364 coupons (watch if B cycle1 $59 retains after t8).
+3. Check active issue age buckets. If any active issue age >0 or negative support posts persist, raise S2/D_S07 ops; if all age0 and posts improve, consider reducing ops slowly.
+4. Confirm S2 content ad economics after B3 (first-month MRR vs ads+compute/support). Keep if CPL ~$40-60 and first-month margin positive.
+5. Enterprise: verify latest non-agent count; watch for counters/acceptances from low offers, and capacity/compute if seats jump.
+6. t1/t2/t3/t5 land Day359 (next week after Day357); plan whether C can later drop to tier4 after those boosts, but do not rush if C premium complaints continue.
 
-## Operating reminders / lessons
-- Every `next-week` requires rationale + 12 forecast numbers in order.
+## Operating reminders
+- Every `next-week` requires rationale + 12 forecast numbers.
 - `set_targeted_ad_spend`, `set_promotion`, targeted ops/dev are **full replacements**.
-- For rolling coupons use exact start_day/cycle queries and verify coverage; never broad-select without checking row count.
-- Enterprise query results cap at 5,000; paginate latest non-agent messages by message_id before sending deals. System blank new-lead rows still need replies even if dashboard says no inbox.
-- Forecast models must not double-count new subscribers: if cash is added at signup, do not bill the same cohort again on signup day.
+- For rolling coupons, split queries under 5,000 rows (per start_day/plan) and verify counts before `set_promotion`.
+- Enterprise latest non-agent messages can be system blanks; they still need replies. Query cap applies—paginate if >5,000.
+- Forecast models must not double-count new subscribers: signup payments are immediate.
 
-## Forecasts to submit Day343 after actions
-- Planned forecast: **1wk $3.9M** (95% **$2.6-5.8M**), **4wk $8.0M** (95% **$2.0-20.0M**), *

files.content:
import novamind_api as nm, json, math, time
D=nm.vars.current_day
print('Day',D,'starting cash',nm.query('SELECT SUM(amount) cash FROM ledger')['rows'][0]['cash'])
# 1) Core cost optimization: t8 lands during this week; move B back to tier3 while keeping premium C at tier5.
print('Set tiers', nm.pricing.set_model_tiers(A=2,B=3,C=5))
print('Keep prices', nm.pricing.set_prices(A=79,B=159,C=349))
print('Keep quotas', nm.pricing.set_usage_quotas(A=50000,B=500000,C=2000000))
print('Keep capacity', nm.infrastructure.set_capacity_tier(tier=6))
# 2) Spending: keep S2 growth/dev, slightly reinforce support queues after social feedback.
print('Daily spend', nm.marketing.set_daily_spend(operations=5000, development=3000))
ops_by_group={
    'S2':50000.0,'D_S07':22000.0,'E3':2000.0,
    'S3':500.0,'D_S04':300.0,'E2':500.0,'D_E02':500.0,'D_E07':500.0,'D_E08':500.0,
    'D_E09':250.0,'E1':250.0,'S1':250.0,'D_S05':100.0,'D_S06':100.0,'D_S10':100.0,
    'D_S03':50.0,'D_E01':250.0,'D_E03':250.0,'D_E05':250.0,'D_E10':250.0,'D_S08':100.0}
print('Targeted ops', nm.analytics.set_targeted_ops_spend(targeted_spend=ops_by_group))
dev_by_group={
    'S2':40000.0,'D_S07':1000.0,'E3':2000.0,
    'D_E02':500.0,'E2':500.0,'D_E07':500.0,'D_E08':500.0,'D_E09':100.0,'E1':100.0,
    'S3':300.0,'D_S04':100.0,'D_S05':50.0,'D_S06':50.0,'D_S10':50.0,'S1':50.0,
    'D_S03':50.0,'D_E01':100.0,'D_E03':100.0,'D_E05':100.0,'D_E10':100.0,'D_S08':50.0}
print('Targeted dev', nm.analytics.set_targeted_dev_spend(targeted_spend=dev_by_group))
print('Ads', nm.marketing.set_targeted_ad_spend(targeted_spend={'content_marketing':{'S2':25000.0}}))
print('Ads strength', nm.marketing.set_ads_strength(global_strength=0.0, by_group={}, by_customer={}))
# 3) Rolling renewal coupons: rebuild by_customer for S2 due days 351-357; preserve standing group/group-plan promos.
by_group={'S2':0.0,'D_S07':40.0,'D_S04':70.0,'S3':40.0,'S1':60.0,'D_S03':70.0,'D_S05':70.0,'D_S06':70.0,'D_S10':50.0,
          'E1':0.0,'E2':0.0,'E3':0.0,'D_E02':0.0,'D_E07':0.0,'D_E08':0.0,'D_E09':0.0,'D_E01':0.0,'D_E03':0.0,'D_E05':0.0,'D_E10':0.0,'D_S08':40.0}
by_group_plan={'D_S04':{'B':20.0,'C':20.0},'D_S07':{'B':20.0}}
# cycle/start ranges with per-plan coupon dollars. Key insight: cycle2 C $180 worked; cycle3-4 $100 worked; cycle1 price alone failed, so use margin-aware B discount and deeper A/C rescue.
rules=[]
# cycle 1: starts 321-327 due 351-357
rules.append((range(321,328), {'A':60.0,'B':100.0,'C':200.0}, 'cycle1'))
# cycle 2: starts 291-297 due 351-357
rules.append((range(291,298), {'A':60.0,'B':180.0,'C':180.0}, 'cycle2'))
# cycle 3: starts 261-267 due 351-357
rules.append((range(261,268), {'A':60.0,'B':100.0,'C':100.0}, 'cycle3'))
# cycle 4: starts 231-237 due 351-357
rules.append((range(231,238), {'A':60.0,'B':100.0,'C':100.0}, 'cycle4'))
by_customer={}
counts={}
for rg,plan_promos,label in rules:
    inlist=','.join(str(x) for x in rg)
    rows=nm.query(f"""
    SELECT s.customer_id,s.plan,
      CASE WHEN ((s.billing_day_mod30-({D}%30)+30)%30)=0 THEN 30 ELSE ((s.billing_day_mod30-({D}%30)+30)%30) END AS days_to_due
    FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c USING(customer_id)
    WHERE s.status='subscribed' AND c.group_id='S2' AND c.customer_type='small' AND s.start_day IN ({inlist})
      AND {D} + (CASE WHEN ((s.billing_day_mod30-({D}%30)+30)%30)=0 THEN 30 ELSE ((s.billing_day_mod30-({D}%30)+30)%30) END) BETWEEN {D+1} AND {D+7}
    """)['rows']
    for r in rows:
        promo=plan_promos.get(r['plan'])
        if promo is not None and promo>0:
            by_customer[int(r['customer_id'])]=float(promo)
            counts[(label,r['plan'],promo)]=counts.get((label,r['plan'],promo),0)+1
print('Coupon target counts', counts, 'total', len(by_customer))
print('Set promo', nm.pricing.set_promotion(global_promotion=0.0, by_group=by_group, by_group_plan=by_group_plan, by_customer=by_customer))
lead_by_group={'S2':10.0,'D_S07':10.0,'D_S04':20.0,'S3':50.0,'S1':20.0,'D_S03':20.0,'D_S05':20.0,'D_S06':20.0,'D_S10':20.0,
               'E1':0.0,'E2':0.0,'E3':0.0,'D_E02':0.0,'D_E07':0.0,'D_E08':0.0,'D_E09':0.0,'D_E01':0.0,'D_E03':0.0,'D_E05':0.0,'D_E10':0.0,'D_S08':20.0}
print('Lead promo', nm.marketing.set_lead_promotion(global_promotion=0.0, by_group=lead_by_group, by_channel={}, by_channel_group={}))
# 4) Public social follow-up to support criticism with concrete metrics and next upgrade.
post="You're right: auto-reply isn't support. This week active-customer tickets stayed same-day; no outage. We're adding public queue audits + office hours so eval blockers get a human owner, not a template. Next reasoning upgrade lands in 48h; we'll publish before/after accuracy."
try:
    print('Social', nm.marketing.post_social_media(content=post, reply_to_post_id=1116))
except Exception as e:
    print('Social post skipped/error',e)
# 5) Enterprise inbox: respond to latest non-agent/system open new leads with low month-to-month per-seat options.
price_map={
    'E1': (4.0,8.0,12.0),
    'E2': (12.0,22.0,35.0),
    'E3': (18.0,30.0,45.0),
    'D_E01': (18.0,30.0,45.0),
    'D_E02': (8.0,16.0,25.0),
    'D_E03': (20.0,35.0,55.0),
    'D_E05': (16.0,28.0,45.0),
    'D_E07': (18.0,32.0,50.0),
    'D_E08': (16.0,28.0,45.0),
    'D_E09': (10.0,18.0,28.0),
    'D_E10': (8.0,16.0,28.0),
}
rows=nm.query("""
WITH latest AS (SELECT customer_id, MAX(message_id) mid FROM enterprise_turns WHERE closed=0 GROUP BY customer_id),
lt AS (SELECT e.* FROM enterprise_turns e JOIN latest l ON e.customer_id=l.customer_id AND e.message_id=l.mid)
SELECT lt.customer_id, lt.message_id, lt.day, lt.sender, lt.thread_type, lt.seat_count, c.group_id
FROM lt JOIN customers c USING(customer_id)
WHERE lt.sender!='agent'
ORDER BY lt.message_id
""")['rows']
print('Enterprise latest non-agent rows',len(rows))
deals=[]
for r in rows:
    g=r['group_id']; prices=price_map.get(g,(10.0,20.0,35.0))
    # For very large seat counts, make C slightly cheaper to increase conversion without dropping below profitable levels.
    seats=r.get('seat_count') or 0
    A,B,C=prices
    if seats>=1000:
        B=max(5.0,B*0.9); C=max(8.0,C*0.9)
    deals.append([int(r['customer_id']), [['A',round(A,2)], ['B',round(B,2)], ['C',round(C,2)]]])
processed=0; errors=0
for i in range(0,len(deals),400):
    batch=deals[i:i+400]
    if not batch: continue
    res=nm.enterprise.send_enterprise_deal(deals=batch)
    processed += len(batch)
    # print compact status counts
    status_counts={}
    for rr in res.get('results',[]):
        if not rr.get('success'): errors += 1
        status_counts[rr.get('status') or rr.get('error')]=status_counts.get(rr.get('status') or rr.get('error'),0)+1
    print('Enterprise batch',i//400+1,'size',len(batch),'status',status_counts)
print('Enterprise processed',processed,'errors',errors)
# Verification snippets
print('Verify latest non-agent count')
print(nm.query("""
WITH latest AS (SELECT customer_id, MAX(message_id) mid FROM enterprise_turns WHERE closed=0 GROUP BY customer_id),
lt AS (SELECT e.* FROM enterprise_turns e JOIN latest l ON e.customer_id=l.customer_id AND e.message_id=l.mid)
SELECT sender,thread_type,COUNT(*) n,MIN(day) min_day,MAX(day) max_day FROM lt GROUP BY sender,thread_type ORDER BY sender,thread_type
""")['rows'])
print('Ending cash',nm.query('SELECT SUM(amount) cash FROM ledger')['rows'][0]['cash'])

import novamind_api as nm, json, math, statistics
D=nm.vars.current_day
print('DAY',D)
print('CASH_LEDGER', nm.query('SELECT SUM(amount) cash FROM ledger')['rows'][0]['cash'])
# Tables count perhaps
#print(nm.query("SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table' ORDER BY name")['rows'])
print('\nLEDGER daily categories last 21')
for row in nm.query(f"""
SELECT day, category, SUM(amount) amount, COUNT(*) cnt
FROM ledger WHERE day BETWEEN {D-20} AND {D}
GROUP BY day,category ORDER BY day,category
""")['rows']:
    print(row)
print('\nLEDGER week totals')
for row in nm.query(f"""
SELECT category, SUM(amount) amount, COUNT(*) cnt
FROM ledger WHERE day BETWEEN {D-6} AND {D}
GROUP BY category ORDER BY amount
""")['rows']:
    print(row)
print('\nCONFIG current overrides')
for st in ['targeted_ad_spend','targeted_ops_spend','targeted_dev_spend','promotion','lead_promotion','ads_strength']:
    rows=nm.query(f"SELECT id,day,tool_name,settings_json FROM config_overrides WHERE setting_type='{st}' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1")['rows']
    if rows:
        r=rows[0]; print('\n',st,'id',r['id'],'day',r['day'],'tool',r['tool_name'])
        try:
            data=json.loads(r['settings_json'])
            if st=='promotion':
                print('global',data.get('global'),'by_group',data.get('by_group'),'by_group_plan',data.get('by_group_plan'),'by_customer_count',len(data.get('by_customer',{})),'sample',list(data.get('by_customer',{}).items())[:10])
            else:
                print(json.dumps(data,indent=2)[:8000])
        except Exception as e: print(r['settings_json'][:1000],e)
print('\nSERVICE last 14')
for row in nm.query(f"""
SELECT day,total_usage_units,p95_ms,error_rate,downtime_minutes,capacity_tier,capacity_units,ROUND(1.0*total_usage_units/capacity_units,3) util
FROM service_day WHERE day BETWEEN {D-13} AND {D} ORDER BY day
""")['rows']: print(row)
print('\nUSAGE last 7 by group plan')
for row in nm.query(f"""
SELECT du.day,c.group_id,s.plan,COUNT(DISTINCT du.customer_id) users,SUM(du.usage_units) usage,AVG(du.usage_units) avg_usage
FROM daily_usage du JOIN customers c ON du.customer_id=c.customer_id JOIN subscriptions s ON du.customer_id=s.customer_id AND s.status='subscribed'
WHERE du.day BETWEEN {D-6} AND {D}
GROUP BY du.day,c.group_id,s.plan
ORDER BY du.day,usage DESC
""")['rows'][:300]: print(row)
print('\nAD day/channel/group last 14')
for row in nm.query(f"""
SELECT day,channel_id,group_id,SUM(spend) spend,SUM(leads_generated) leads,ROUND(1.0*SUM(spend)/MAX(SUM(leads_generated),1),1) cpl
FROM ad_channel_leads WHERE day BETWEEN {D-13} AND {D}
GROUP BY day,channel_id,group_id ORDER BY day,channel_id,group_id
""")['rows']: print(row)
print('\nAD summary last7')
for row in nm.query(f"""
SELECT channel_id,group_id,SUM(spend) spend,SUM(leads_generated) leads,ROUND(1.0*SUM(spend)/MAX(SUM(leads_generated),1),2) cpl
FROM ad_channel_leads WHERE day BETWEEN {D-6} AND {D}
GROUP BY channel_id,group_id ORDER BY spend DESC
""")['rows']: print(row)
print('\nNew small cohorts last7 status/source')
for row in nm.query(f"""
SELECT c.created_day,c.group_id,c.acquisition_source,s.status,s.plan,COUNT(*) n,SUM(s.effective_price) eff_mrr,AVG(s.promotion) avg_promo
FROM customers c JOIN subscriptions s USING(customer_id)
WHERE c.created_day BETWEEN {D-6} AND {D} AND c.customer_type='small'
GROUP BY c.created_day,c.group_id,c.acquisition_source,s.status,s.plan
ORDER BY c.created_day,c.group_id,c.acquisition_source,s.status,s.plan
""")['rows']: print(row)
print('\nActive small sub summary')
for row in nm.query("""
SELECT c.group_id,s.plan,COUNT(*) subs,SUM(s.effective_price) mrr,AVG(s.effective_price) avg_eff,AVG(s.promotion) avg_promo,AVG(s.seat_count) avg_seat
FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c USING(customer_id)
WHERE s.status='subscribed' AND c.customer_type='small'
GROUP BY c.group_id,s.plan ORDER BY mrr DESC
""")['rows']: print(row)
print('\nActive enterprise sub summary')
for row in nm.query("""
SELECT c.group_id,s.plan,COUNT(*) customers,SUM(s.seat_count) seats,SUM(s.effective_price*s.seat_count) mrr,AVG(s.effective_price) avg_eff,AVG(s.promotion) avg_promo
FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c USING(customer_id)
WHERE s.status='subscribed' AND c.customer_type='large'
GROUP BY c.group_id,s.plan ORDER BY mrr DESC
""")['rows']: print(row)
print('\nCancellations last7 group/plan/start_day/status top')
for row in nm.query(f"""
SELECT s.end_day,c.group_id,s.start_day,s.plan,s.status,COUNT(*) n,AVG(s.effective_price) avg_eff,AVG(s.promotion) avg_promo
FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c USING(customer_id)
WHERE s.end_day BETWEEN {D-6} AND {D}
GROUP BY s.end_day,c.group_id,s.start_day,s.plan,s.status
ORDER BY s.end_day,c.group_id,n DESC
""")['rows'][:1000]: print(row)
print('\nCohort outcomes S2/D_S07 starts around due 344-350 (after week)')
for group in ['S2','D_S07']:
    print('GROUP',group)
    # starts whose due dates were D-6..D: start_day = due-30*k, k 1..12
    vals=[]
    for due in range(D-6,D+1):
        for k in range(1,13): vals.append(due-30*k)
    inlist=','.join(str(x) for x in sorted(set(vals)))
    for row in nm.query(f"""
    SELECT s.start_day, CAST(({D}-s.start_day)/30 AS INT) cycles_floor, s.plan,s.status,COUNT(*) n,SUM(s.effective_price) eff_sum,AVG(s.effective_price) avg_eff,AVG(s.promotion) avg_promo
    FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c USING(customer_id)
    WHERE c.group_id='{group}' AND s.start_day IN ({inlist})
    GROUP BY s.start_day,s.plan,s.status ORDER BY s.start_day,s.plan,s.status
    """)['rows']:
        print(row)
print('\nUpcoming due 351-357 detailed')
rows=nm.query(f"""
WITH active AS (
 SELECT c.group_id,c.customer_type,s.plan,s.start_day,s.billing_day_mod30,s.customer_id,s.seat_count,s.effective_price,s.promotion,
        CAST(({D} - s.start_day)/30 AS INT) AS cycles_elapsed,
        CASE WHEN ((s.billing_day_mod30 - ({D} % 30) + 30) % 30)=0 THEN 30 ELSE ((s.billing_day_mod30 - ({D} % 30) + 30) % 30) END AS days_to_due
 FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c USING(customer_id) WHERE s.status='subscribed')
SELECT {D}+days_to_due AS due_day, group_id, customer_type, plan, cycles_elapsed+1 AS next_cycle, COUNT(*) n,SUM(seat_count) seats,SUM(effective_price*seat_count) current_eff_mrr,AVG(promotion) avg_promo,AVG(effective_price) avg_eff
FROM active WHERE {D}+days_to_due BETWEEN {D+1} AND {D+7}
GROUP BY due_day,group_id,customer_type,plan,next_cycle
ORDER BY due_day,group_id,plan,next_cycle
""")['rows']
for row in rows: print(row)
print('Total due current_eff_mrr',sum(r['current_eff_mrr'] or 0 for r in rows),'n',sum(r['n'] for r in rows),'seats',sum(r['seats'] or 0 for r in rows))
print('\nUpcoming due totals 351-378 by day')
for row in nm.query(f"""
WITH active AS (
 SELECT s.customer_id,s.seat_count,s.effective_price,CASE WHEN ((s.billing_day_mod30 - ({D} % 30) + 30) % 30)=0 THEN 30 ELSE ((s.billing_day_mod30 - ({D} % 30) + 30) % 30) END AS days_to_due
 FROM subscriptions s WHERE s.status='subscribed')
SELECT {D}+days_to_due due_day,COUNT(*) n,SUM(seat_count) seats,SUM(effective_price*seat_count) eff_mrr
FROM active WHERE {D}+days_to_due BETWEEN {D+1} AND {D+28} GROUP BY due_day ORDER BY due_day
""")['rows']: print(row)
print('\nOpen issues by active/substatus age')
for row in nm.query("""
SELECT i.group_id,CASE WHEN s.status='subscribed' THEN 'active' ELSE COALESCE(s.status,'no_sub') END sub_status,COUNT(*) issues,AVG(i.days_open) avg_age,MAX(i.days_open) max_age,SUM(CASE WHEN i.days_open>=1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) ge1,SUM(CASE WHEN i.days_open>=2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) ge2,SUM(CASE WHEN i.days_open>=7 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) ge7
FROM issues i LEFT JOIN subscriptions s ON i.customer_id=s.customer_id
WHERE i.status='open'
GROUP BY i.group_id,sub_status ORDER BY issues DESC
""")['rows']: print(row)
print('\nOpen issues active age buckets')
for row in nm.query("""
SELECT i.group_id,s.plan,i.days_open,COUNT(*) n
FROM issues i JOIN subscriptions s ON i.customer_id=s.customer_id AND s.status='subscribed'
WHERE i.status='open'
GROUP BY i.group_id,s.plan,i.days_open ORDER BY i.group_id,s.plan,i.days_open
""")['rows']: print(row)
print('\nIssues opened/resolved last14')
for row in nm.query(f"""
WITH days(day) AS (SELECT {D-13} UNION ALL SELECT day+1 FROM days WHERE day<{D}),
o AS (SELECT open_day day,COUNT(*) opened FROM issues WHERE open_day BETWEEN {D-13} AND {D} GROUP BY open_day),
r AS (SELECT resolved_day day,COUNT(*) resolved FROM issues WHERE resolved_day BETWEEN {D-13} AND {D} GROUP BY resolved_day)
SELECT days.day,COALESCE(o.opened,0) opened,COALESCE(r.resolved,0) resolved FROM days LEFT JOIN o USING(day) LEFT JOIN r USING(day) ORDER BY day
""")['rows']: print(row)
print('\nSocial API last14')
try:
    posts=nm.analytics.get_social_posts(days=14,limit=80)
    print('total',posts.get('total'))
    for p in posts.get('posts',[]): print(p)
except Exception as e: print('social error',e)
print('\nAgent social posts recent')
try:
    for row in nm.query("SELECT * FROM agent_social_media_posts ORDER BY day DESC LIMIT 20")['rows']: print(row)
except Exception as e: print('agent social query error',e)
print('\nEnterprise open latest counts')
for row in nm.query("""
WITH latest AS (SELECT customer_id,MAX(message_id) mid FROM enterprise_turns WHERE closed=0 GROUP BY customer_id),
lt AS (SELECT e.* FROM enterprise_turns e JOIN latest l ON e.customer_id=l.customer_id AND e.message_id=l.mid)
SELECT sender,thread_type,COUNT(*) n,SUM(seat_count) seats,MIN(day) min_day,MAX(day) max_day FROM lt GROUP BY sender,thread_type ORDER BY sender,thread_type
""")['rows']: print(row)
print('\nEnterprise samples latest customer/system')
for row in nm.query("""
WITH latest AS (SELECT customer_id,MAX(message_id) mid FROM enterprise_turns WHERE closed=0 GROUP BY customer_id),
lt AS (SELECT e.* FROM enterprise_turns e JOIN latest l ON e.customer_id=l.customer_id AND e.message_id=l.mid)
SELECT message_id,customer_id,day,thread_type,sender,seat_count,substr(message_text,1,240) msg,offer_json FROM lt WHERE sender!='agent' ORDER BY message_id DESC LIMIT 20
""")['rows']: print(row)
print('\nEnterprise accepted/rejected last14')
for row in nm.query(f"""
SELECT day,close_reason,COUNT(*) n,SUM(seat_count) seats FROM enterprise_turns WHERE closed=1 AND day BETWEEN {D-13} AND {D} GROUP BY day,close_reason ORDER BY day,close_reason
""")['rows']: print(row)
print('\nEnterprise active detail')
for row in nm.query("""
SELECT c.customer_id,c.group_id,s.plan,s.seat_count,s.effective_price,s.listed_price,s.promotion,s.start_day,s.billing_day_mod30,s.contract_start_day,c.company_primary_concern,c.company_size_descriptor,c.company_decision_style
FROM customers c JOIN subscriptions s USING(customer_id) WHERE c.customer_type='large' AND s.status='subscribed' ORDER BY s.seat_count DESC LIMIT 100
""")['rows']: print(row)
print('\nResearch projects')
try:
    print(nm.research.list_research_projects())
except Exception as e: print('list research err',e)
try:
    for row in nm.query("SELECT * FROM research_projects ORDER BY expected_completion_day,project_id LIMIT 300")['rows']: print(row)
except Exception as e: print('research query err',e)

import novamind_api as nm
D=nm.vars.current_day
by_group={'S2':0.0,'D_S07':40.0,'D_S04':70.0,'S3':40.0,'S1':60.0,'D_S03':70.0,'D_S05':70.0,'D_S06':70.0,'D_S10':50.0,
          'E1':0.0,'E2':0.0,'E3':0.0,'D_E02':0.0,'D_E07':0.0,'D_E08':0.0,'D_E09':0.0,'D_E01':0.0,'D_E03':0.0,'D_E05':0.0,'D_E10':0.0,'D_S08':40.0}
by_group_plan={'D_S04':{'B':20.0,'C':20.0},'D_S07':{'B':20.0}}
rules=[]
for sd in range(321,328):
    rules += [(sd,'A',60.0),(sd,'B',100.0),(sd,'C',200.0)]
for sd in range(291,298):
    rules += [(sd,'A',60.0),(sd,'B',180.0),(sd,'C',180.0)]
for sd in range(261,268):
    rules += [(sd,'A',60.0),(sd,'B',100.0),(sd,'C',100.0)]
for sd in range(231,238):
    rules += [(sd,'A',60.0),(sd,'B',100.0),(sd,'C',100.0)]
by_customer={}; counts={}; total_rows=0
for sd,plan,promo in rules:
    rows=nm.query(f"""
    SELECT s.customer_id FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c USING(customer_id)
    WHERE s.status='subscribed' AND c.group_id='S2' AND c.customer_type='small' AND s.start_day={sd} AND s.plan='{plan}'
      AND {D} + (CASE WHEN ((s.billing_day_mod30-({D}%30)+30)%30)=0 THEN 30 ELSE ((s.billing_day_mod30-({D}%30)+30)%30) END) BETWEEN {D+1} AND {D+7}
    ORDER BY s.customer_id
    """)['rows']
    if len(rows)>=5000:
        print('WARNING possible truncation',sd,plan,len(rows))
    for r in rows:
        by_customer[int(r['customer_id'])]=promo
    if rows:
        counts[(sd,plan,promo)]=len(rows); total_rows += len(rows)
print('rule counts')
for k in sorted(counts): print(k,counts[k])
print('unique targets',len(by_customer),'sum rule rows',total_rows)
# Compare expected aggregate by start/plan from counts query (no row cap issue)
print('expected aggregate')
for r in nm.query(f"""
SELECT s.start_day,s.plan,COUNT(*) n FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c USING(customer_id)
WHERE s.status='subscribed' AND c.group_id='S2' AND c.customer_type='small'
  AND ((s.start_day BETWEEN 321 AND 327) OR (s.start_day BETWEEN 291 AND 297) OR (s.start_day BETWEEN 261 AND 267) OR (s.start_day BETWEEN 231 AND 237))
  AND {D} + (CASE WHEN ((s.billing_day_mod30-({D}%30)+30)%30)=0 THEN 30 ELSE ((s.billing_day_mod30-({D}%30)+30)%30) END) BETWEEN {D+1} AND {D+7}
GROUP BY s.start_day,s.plan ORDER BY s.start_day,s.plan
""")['rows']:
    print(r)
res=nm.pricing.set_promotion(global_promotion=0.0, by_group=by_group, by_group_plan=by_group_plan, by_customer=by_customer)
print('set_promotion total by_customer returned',len(res.get('by_customer',{})))
# verify latest override count and spot missing count
print('verify targeted due coverage by promo')
# Cannot query config by_customer easily here; query active targets and compare in Python was already done.
print('done')

 SELECT c.group_id,s.plan,s.start_day,s.billing_day_mod30,s.customer_id,s.seat_count,s.effective_price,s.promotion,
        CAST(({D}-s.start_day)/30 AS INT)+1 AS next_cycle,

FROM active WHERE {D}+days_to_due BETWEEN {D+1} AND {D+7}

import novamind_api as nm, json

for st in ['targeted_ops_spend','targeted_dev_spend','targeted_ad_spend','promotion','lead_promotion','ads_strength']:
 rows=nm.query(f"SELECT id,day,settings_json FROM config_overrides WHERE setting_type='{st}' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1")['rows']
 if rows:
  data=json.loads(rows[0]['settings_json']); print(st,'id',rows[0]['id'],'day',rows[0]['day'])
  if st=='promotion': print('promo counts', data.get('global'), len(data.get('by_customer',{})), data.get('by_group'), data.get('by_group_plan'))
  else: print(str(data)[:1000])
# verify latest non-agent enterprise
print('enterprise latest counts', nm.query("""
WITH latest AS (SELECT customer_id,MAX(message_id) mid FROM enterprise_turns WHERE closed=0 GROUP BY customer_id), lt AS (SELECT e.* FROM enterprise_turns e JOIN latest l ON e.customer_id=l.customer_id AND e.message_id=l.mid)
SELECT sender,thread_type,COUNT(*) n,MIN(day) min_day,MAX(day) max_day FROM lt GROUP BY sender,thread_type ORDER BY sender,thread_type
""")['rows'])
# active due target counts with by_customer promotion not directly in subs until billing; just print target count expected
print('promo target expected aggregate')
for r in nm.query(f"""
SELECT s.start_day,s.plan,COUNT(*) n FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c USING(customer_id)
WHERE s.status='subscribed' AND c.group_id='S2' AND c.customer_type='small'
  AND ((s.start_day BETWEEN 321 AND 327) OR (s.start_day BETWEEN 291 AND 297) OR (s.start_day BETWEEN 261 AND 267) OR (s.start_day BETWEEN 231 AND 237))
  AND {D} + (CASE WHEN ((s.billing_day_mod30-({D}%30)+30)%30)=0 THEN 30 ELSE ((s.billing_day_mod30-({D}%30)+30)%30) END) BETWEEN {D+1} AND {D+7}
GROUP BY s.plan ORDER BY s.plan
""")['rows']: print(r)
# current weekly usage to estimate compute under B3 (based last7 usage, current plan/tier)
costs={1:0.0003,2:0.002,3:0.006,4:0.012,5:0.03}
tiers={'A':2,'B':3,'C':5}
rows=nm.query(f"""
SELECT s.plan,SUM(du.usage_units) usage FROM daily_usage du JOIN subscriptions s ON du.customer_id=s.customer_id AND s.status='subscribed'
WHERE du.day BETWEEN {D-6} AND {D} GROUP BY s.plan
""")['rows']
print('last7 usage by plan and projected compute current tiers')
proj=0
for r in rows:
 cost=(r['usage'] or 0)*costs[tiers[r['plan']]]; proj+=cost; print(r,'cost',cost)
print('projected last7 compute with B3',proj,'vs actual',nm.query(f"SELECT SUM(amount) a FROM ledger WHERE category='compute' AND day BETWEEN {D-6} AND {D}")['rows'][0]['a'])
